scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 407 Proxy Authentication Required WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="hautelook.local",qop="auth",opaque="1234567890abcedef",nonce="16d6523f8425d0d479e886d8de76a0112f8f452162f",algorithm=MD5,stale=false [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Av-Global-Session-ID: e092d220-df10-11e9-b2b2-0050569b4bef Server: AVAYA-SM-7.0.1.2.701230 Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1621593162 2 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 29419 RTP/AVP 9 8 101 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=mid:1 a=rtcp:22471 IN IP4 [local_ip]
